original_image_tags: Back of a worn, aged paper document, likely a carbon copy or routing slip. The page is light beige/yellowed with two hole-punch marks at the top. Faint, mirrored text from the reverse side is visible throughout the page body.

elements.description: Two black hole-punch circles at the top. Faint, mostly illegible reversed text visible through the page from the other side. Multiple stamped annotations in blue and red ink, including: 'MR JONES', 'JUN 6 9 45 AM 50', 'RECEIVED', 'JUN 5 4 45 PM 50', 'FBI', 'U S DEPT OF JUSTICE', 'RECEIVED', 'RECORDS SEC', and 'JUN 5 3 56 PM 50'.

judge.reason: Description B invents multiple specific stamped annotations (e.g. 'MR JONES', 'JUN 6 9 45 AM 50', 'FBI', 'U S DEPT OF JUSTICE', 'RECORDS SEC', 'JUN 5 3 56 PM 50') that are entirely absent from Description A, which only notes faint mirrored text and no other visual content.
